author: Cortex XSOAR

automation.description: This script expires users password for multiple services.
automation.name: expire-password

automation.description: This script gathers endpoint data from multiple integrations and returns an endpoint entity with consolidated information to the context.
automation.name: get-endpoint-data

automation.description: The script blocks a list of IP addresses in supported integrations.
automation.name: block-external-ip

automation.description: This script gathers IP reputation data from multiple integrations and returns an IP entity with consolidated information in the context. Note: If enabled, get-endpoint-data is executed only for internal IP addresses.
automation.name: ip-enrichment

automation.description: This script gathers CVE reputation data from multiple integrations and returns a "CVEEnrichment" object with consolidated information to the context output.
automation.name: cve-enrichment

automation.description: This script disables users for multiple services.
automation.name: disable-user

automation.description: This script gathers URL reputation data from multiple integrations and returns a "URLEnrichment" object with consolidated information in the context output.
automation.name: url-enrichment

automation.description: This script clears user sessions across multiple integrations for a list of usernames.
automation.name: clear-user-session

automation.description: Enriches indicators from a provided list or a block of free text. This script detects the indicator type and runs the correct underlying enrichment script. Currently supports: IP, URL, Domain, CVE, and File.
automation.name: indicator-enrichment

automation.description: This script gathers for reputation data from multiple integrations and returns a "FileEnrichment" object with consolidated information in the context output. Note: The script runs core-get-hash-analytics-prevalence on SHA256 values only.
automation.name: file-enrichment

automation.description: This script enriches Domains data with information from multiple integrations and returns a "DomainEnrichment" object with consolidated information in the context output.
automation.name: domain-enrichment

automation.description: This script isolates endpoints using multiple integrations and returns a success or failure message.
automation.name: isolate-endpoint

automation.description: This script gathers user data from multiple integrations and returns an Account entity with consolidated information to the context.
automation.name: get-user-data

automation.description: This script executes the 'quarantine-file' command on a specified file via the appropriate agent. This script is used to isolate files identified as suspicious. Currently supported brands are "Cortex XDR - IR", "Cortex Core - IR", and "Microsoft Defender Advanced Threat Protection".
automation.name: quarantine-file

description: A pack containing all aggregated scripts.
name: Aggregated Scripts
readme:
#### What does this pack do?

The Aggregated Scripts pack contains scripts that execute multiple commands, significantly streamlining playbook creation and execution.
